---
name: 🚀 Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement for Fasal Saathi
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: feature
assignees: ""
---

## 📌 Description
Provide a clear and concise description of the feature you want to implement.

---

## 🎯 Objective
What problem does this feature solve?  
Why is it important for farmers/users?

---

## 🛠️ Proposed Solution
Describe how you plan to implement this feature.

---

## 📌 Features to Include
- 
- 
- 

---

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered
Mention any alternative solutions or features you considered.

---

## 🧪 Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Feature is implemented as described  
- [ ] UI is responsive and consistent  
- [ ] No errors in console  
- [ ] Proper documentation added  

---

## 📷 Screenshots / References (if any)
Add mockups, UI inspiration, or references.

---
## 📢 Contribution Guidelines
- Comment **"assign me"** to work on this issue  
- Wait for assignment before starting  
- Follow project coding standards  
- Submit a clean PR with description
